label: build
command: npm --prefix web/admin ci && npm --prefix web/admin run build && mkdir -p internal/server/adminassets/generated && find internal/server/adminassets/generated -mindepth 1 ! -name placeholder.txt -exec rm -rf {} + && cp -R web/admin/dist/. internal/server/adminassets/generated/ && GOFLAGS=-mod=mod go build -trimpath -ldflags="-s" .

label: build: admin assets
command: npm --prefix web/admin ci && npm --prefix web/admin run build && mkdir -p internal/server/adminassets/generated && find internal/server/adminassets/generated -mindepth 1 ! -name placeholder.txt -exec rm -rf {} + && cp -R web/admin/dist/. internal/server/adminassets/generated/
